---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for KXDS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see in KXDS.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or use case that this feature would solve:
- What are you trying to accomplish?
- Why is this feature important to you?
- How would you use this feature?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature should work:
- What would the API/syntax look like?
- How should it behave?
- What options or configuration might be needed?

## XSD Example

If applicable, provide an example XSD schema that demonstrates the feature:

```xml
<!-- Example XSD schema -->
```

## Expected Generated Code

If applicable, show what the generated Kotlin code should look like:

```kotlin
// Expected generated code
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered:
- Other approaches you've thought about
- Workarounds you're currently using
- Similar features in other tools

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here:
- Links to relevant XSD specifications
- Examples from other code generation tools
- Diagrams or mockups

## Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Users working with specific XSD features
- [ ] Users in specific domains (e.g., finance, healthcare)
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would be helpful
- [ ] Critical for my use case

## Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a pull request for this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can provide more examples or feedback
- [ ] I'm just suggesting the idea
